# Pull Request Template

## Story / Work Order

- Story: `<story-id>`
- Work Order: `<work-order-id>`

## Summary

- <What changed>
- <Why it changed>

## Screenshots / Recording

<Attach if UI/UX changed.>

## Test Plan

- [ ] Lint:
- [ ] Typecheck:
- [ ] Tests:
- [ ] Manual verification:

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk:
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is scoped to one story/work order
- [ ] Acceptance criteria pass
- [ ] No out-of-MVP feature added
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] RAID updated if risk/debt found
- [ ] Solo PM reviewed before merge
